---
title: "Fagaceae (Oak & Beech family)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->


## Planting summary

| Species | Trees | Planted locations |
|---|---:|---|
| [Beech](/trees/species/beech.html) | 0 | — |
| [Cork Oak](/trees/species/cork-oak.html) | 1 | SK: Darwin Centre Courtyard |
| [English Oak](/trees/species/english-oak.html) | 1 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Holm Oak](/trees/species/holm-oak.html) | 1 | SK: Nature Discovery Garden |
| [Sweet Chestnut](/trees/species/sweet-chestnut.html) | 0 | — |
